title: Who works on the same files
description: Discover collaboration patterns: contributors who frequently modify the same files share implicit knowledge dependencies.

basis.title: Analysis basis
basis.description: Review the repository, time window, and filter scope before inspecting collaboration pairs.

ranking.title: Collaboration ranking
ranking.description: Contributors grouped by how many files they co-modify. Select a pair to see details.

details.title: Pair details
details.strongReading: These contributors frequently work on the same files. Consider them as knowledge-sharing partners or review buddies.
details.moderateReading: Some overlap in file ownership. Monitor for potential knowledge silos.
details.weakReading: Minimal overlap. These contributors work in largely independent areas.

empty.noPairs: No collaboration pairs detected in the analyzed period.
empty.selectWorkspace: Select a repository to detect collaboration patterns.
